title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Win Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's victory impacts their standing in the ACC Tournament and their chances for the NCAA tournament.

title: Virginia Secures Victory Against NC State, 81-74
summary: Malik Thomas and Thijs De Ridder lead No. 10 Virginia to an 81-74 win over NC State in the ACC Tournament.
charlotte_impact: This win is crucial for Virginia's momentum and potential advancement in the ACC Tournament.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament
summary: Virginia plays NC State in a quarterfinal round matchup at the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game determines which team advances further in the ACC Tournament.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Predictions
summary: Preview of the NC State Wolfpack vs. No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers ACC Tournament quarterfinal game in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Provides insights and predictions for fans and bettors interested in the game.

title: Two Seriously Injured in West Charlotte Shooting
summary: Two victims were found shot on Lucky Penny Street in west Charlotte on Friday afternoon. Medic responded to the scene.
charlotte_impact: This incident raises concerns about public safety and potential violence in the area.

title: Sustain Charlotte Challenges I-77 South Alternatives
summary: Sustain Charlotte launches a public challenge regarding alternatives to the I-77 South project, which impacts greenways and parks.
charlotte_impact: Highlights community concerns about the environmental impact of infrastructure projects.

title: New Traffic Signal Planned Near Fort Mill School
summary: A new traffic light is planned in the Catawba Ridge High School area to address safety concerns for students and drivers.
charlotte_impact: Addresses safety issues for students and drivers near a high school.

title: Two Drivers Killed in Head-On Crash in Lancaster
summary: A head-on collision on Airport Road near Golf Course Road in Lancaster resulted in the deaths of two drivers on Friday morning.
charlotte_impact: Fatal accidents highlight the importance of road safety and cautious driving.

title: Government Shutdown Could Lengthen Charlotte Airport Wait Times
summary: A partial government shutdown may cause longer TSA wait times at Charlotte airport. Passengers are advised to arrive early.
charlotte_impact: Informs travelers about potential disruptions due to the government shutdown.

title: NC Allows Road Tests at Private Schools
summary: North Carolina adults can now take driver's license road tests at certified private schools, aiming to reduce wait times.
charlotte_impact: Improves convenience and reduces wait times for obtaining a driver's license.

title: Lancaster Police Seek Missing Teen
summary: Lancaster Police are seeking help to find a missing 15-year-old girl possibly taken by a non-custodial parent in Hartsville, SC.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness and seeks public assistance in locating a missing teenager.

title: Weekend Warmup After Cold Start
summary: After a cold Friday, the weekend will bring temperatures in the 70s before a cool down early next week.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather forecast for the weekend, allowing people to plan accordingly.

title: Man Charged in Hit-and-Run Near School Bus Stop
summary: Adarias Steffon Oliver is charged with felony hit-and-run after allegedly striking a 7-year-old near a school bus stop in University City.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of reckless driving near school zones.

title: Waxhaw Police Investigate Murder-Suicide
summary: Waxhaw police are investigating an apparent murder-suicide involving a couple. They believe it is an isolated incident.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a tragic event and assures the public there is no ongoing threat.

title: Reward Offered in Search for Missing Anson County Teen
summary: Anson County authorities are offering a reward for the safe return of a missing 19-year-old last seen in the Morven area.
charlotte_impact: Seeks public assistance in locating a missing young adult.
